title: pilea rotundata var. rotundata
intro: Pilea rotundata var. rotundata, also known as the green inch plant or baby tears, is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is used to treat various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Pilea rotundata var. rotundata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in many cultures. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
